description_long: This is a sporty running shoe featuring a predominantly blue mesh upper with synthetic overlays for structure and durability. The shoe has vibrant pink accents, including a distinctive side logo and lace details, as well as white and light blue highlights around the collar and sole. The lacing system is standard, with blue and pink criss-cross laces threaded through reinforced eyelets. The midsole is thick and white, designed for cushioning, while the outsole appears to have a textured grip suitable for urban surfaces. The heel features additional branding and a pull tab for easy wearing. The overall design suggests comfort, breathability, and support for active use in urban environments.
description: A blue athletic running shoe with pink accents, white midsole, and a breathable mesh upper. Features a standard criss-cross lacing system and a textured sole for grip.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, blue mesh upper, and criss-cross laces with pink highlights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the large pink logo, blue overlays, and the thick white midsole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the heel branding, pull tab, and layered heel construction.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the pink logo, blue mesh, and white sole.
attribute_logo: White ASICS logo on both sides, small white logo on heel
